Custom Banner Grommet Kit Features & What's Included

The grommet kit from Banners.com gives you everything you need to repair torn-out grommets or add extra mounting points to your custom printed banners. Whether you need to reinforce an existing banner or customize grommet placement for a specific hanging setup, this all-in-one kit makes the job fast and easy.

What's Included in the Grommet Kit

  • 20 Grommets — Includes 20 washers and 20 brass grommets for secure, long-lasting hold
  • 1 Cutting Tool — Precision hole-cutting tool for clean material cuts
  • 1 Insert Punch — Used to set and secure grommets flush against the material
  • 1 Setting Die (Base) — Provides a stable base for consistent grommet installation

This grommet kit is compatible with vinyl banners, mesh banners, and other banner materials. It is an essential accessory for anyone who frequently displays or installs custom banners.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Grommet Kit Materials & Component Quality

Each grommet kit is built with durable components designed for repeated use on banner materials of various thicknesses.

Grommet Construction

The grommets included in the kit are made from brass-plated steel, providing corrosion resistance and a secure hold when installed on vinyl, mesh, or fabric banner substrates. Brass grommets maintain their strength in both indoor and outdoor environments.

Tool Quality

The cutting tool, insert punch, and setting die are manufactured from hardened metal to withstand repeated impacts. These tools are designed to create clean, uniform grommet installations every time.

Compatible Banner Materials

  • 13 oz. Vinyl Banners — Standard scrim vinyl for indoor and outdoor use
  • Mesh Banners — Wind-resistant perforated vinyl for fences and construction sites
  • Fabric Banners — Polyester and canvas materials for trade show and display applications
  • Double-Sided Banners — Blockout vinyl banners with dual-face printing
PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing & Installation Options for Banner Grommets

Proper grommet installation requires correct finishing techniques to ensure a secure, long-lasting mount. Follow these guidelines when using your grommet kit to finish banner edges.

Hemmed Edges for Grommet Strength

For the strongest grommet hold, always fold the banner material to create a hem before installing grommets. A folded hem doubles the material thickness at each grommet point, reducing the risk of tear-out under wind or weight stress.

Grommet Spacing Recommendations

  • Standard Spacing: Place grommets every 24 inches along the banner edge for balanced support
  • High-Wind Installations: Reduce spacing to every 12–18 inches for additional holding strength
  • Corner Grommets: Always install grommets at each corner of the banner, approximately 1 inch from the edge

Installation Surface Tips

Use a solid wood block beneath the banner material when cutting holes and setting grommets. This provides a stable surface and prevents damage to the cutting tool and work area.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Production & Turnaround Times for Grommet Kit Orders

Grommet kits are in-stock accessories that ship quickly from our warehouse. Unlike custom-printed banners, grommet kits do not require production time for printing or finishing.

Standard Processing

Orders for grommet kits are typically processed within 1 business day. Once processed, your kit is packaged and handed off to the shipping carrier.

Combine with Banner Orders

If you are ordering a grommet kit alongside a custom vinyl banner or other printed product, your order will ship together once the printed items have completed production. Production times for printed products range from 1 to 5 business days depending on the turnaround option selected at checkout.

Accepted Payment Methods

Grommet kits are compact accessories that ship affordably via standard ground carriers. Shipping costs are calculated at checkout based on your delivery address and selected shipping speed.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Popular Uses for Banner Grommet Kits

A grommet kit is a versatile accessory that serves both professionals and do-it-yourself banner installers. Here are the most common applications for banner grommet kits.

Repairing Torn or Damaged Grommets

Wind, weather, and repeated use can cause grommets to pull through banner material over time. A grommet kit lets you remove the damaged grommet area, reinforce the material with a hem, and install a fresh grommet for a secure hold.

Adding Extra Mounting Points

If your banner needs additional attachment points for a specific installation—such as mounting to a fence, building, or custom frame—a grommet kit allows you to add grommets wherever you need them.

Custom Banner Installations

  • Fence-Mounted Banners — Add grommets along all edges for zip-tie or bungee cord attachment to chain-link fences
  • Building & Storefront Displays — Install grommets at specific intervals to align with hooks or mounting hardware
  • Event & Trade Show Banners — Customize grommet placement for pipe-and-drape systems or display frames
  • Construction Site Wraps — Add reinforcement grommets to large mesh or vinyl banners for high-wind areas

DIY Banner Projects

For custom banner projects at home, school, or for community events, a grommet kit provides a professional-quality finishing touch without specialized equipment.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

How to Install Grommets on Banners Using a Grommet Kit

Follow these step-by-step instructions to install grommets on any banner material using your grommet kit from Banners.com.

Step-by-Step Grommet Installation

  1. Fold and hem the material. Always fold the banner edge to create a doubled-over hem. Mark the location for each grommet hole on the hemmed edge.
  2. Cut the hole. Place a solid wood block under the banner material. Position the cutting tool over your marked spot and strike it firmly with a wooden or plastic mallet to punch a clean hole.
  3. Place the grommet. Set the grommet (post facing up) onto the setting die base. Center the hole in the banner material over the grommet post.
  4. Add the washer. Place the washer, rounded side up, over the grommet post and banner material.
  5. Set the grommet. Insert the punch tool into the grommet tube. Tap the punch squarely with a hammer, rotating the punch a quarter turn between strikes, until the grommet and washer fit tightly against the material.

Tips for Best Results

  • Use a sturdy, flat wood block as your work surface to protect tools and ensure clean cuts
  • Strike the cutting tool and punch firmly and evenly to avoid misaligned grommet sets
  • Always rotate the punch between hammer strikes to ensure the grommet curls evenly around the washer
  • Test your first grommet on scrap material before working on your finished banner

Order Your Grommet Kit & Banner Accessories Today

Ready to repair, reinforce, or customize the grommet placement on your banners? The Banners.com grommet kit includes everything you need—20 brass grommets, a cutting tool, an insert punch, and a setting die—all in one convenient package.

Whether you are maintaining an existing banner display or preparing a new custom installation, this grommet kit gives you the tools to get a professional-quality result. Add a grommet kit to your cart today and keep your banners looking sharp and securely mounted.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Grommet Kit Frequently Asked Questions

What is included in a grommet kit?

Each grommet kit includes 20 brass grommets (with 20 matching washers), 1 cutting tool for punching clean holes, 1 insert punch for setting the grommets, and 1 setting die base. Everything you need to install grommets on banner material is included in the kit.

What size grommets come in the grommet kit?

The grommet kit includes standard-size brass grommets commonly used on vinyl and mesh banners. These grommets are compatible with the standard grommet size used across the banner printing industry.

Can I use a grommet kit on vinyl banners?

Yes. The grommet kit works on 13 oz. vinyl banners, mesh banners, fabric banners, and other common banner substrates. For best results, fold the material to create a hem at the grommet location before cutting and setting.

How many grommets does the kit include?

Each kit includes 20 complete grommet sets (20 grommets and 20 washers). If you need additional grommets beyond the 20 included, you can order multiple kits—up to 10 kits per order.

Do I need special tools to install grommets?

No. The grommet kit comes with all the specialized tools required—a cutting tool, insert punch, and setting die. The only additional items you need are a wooden or plastic mallet (or hammer) and a solid wood block to use as a work surface.

Can I add grommets to fabric banners with this kit?

Yes. The grommet kit can be used on polyester fabric banners, canvas banners, and other fabric substrates. Hemming the fabric edge before setting the grommet provides the strongest hold on thinner materials.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
